title: proclesia scabriuscula
intro: Proclesia scabriuscula, also known as a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, is a type of shrub native to tropical Africa. The medicinal properties of Proclesia scabriuscula include its ability to exhibit antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and act as an antiseptic, thereby promoting overall well-being. Herbal preparations of Proclesia scabriuscula typically involve infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea or applying a decoction of the plant to affected areas.
